name: ops
description: Business operations command center for Claude Code — 35 skills, 18 agents, and a smart background daemon that manage communications (WhatsApp/Email/Slack/Telegram), projects, infrastructure (all AWS services), revenue (Stripe + RevenueCat), e-commerce (Shopify), marketing (Klaviyo/Meta/GA4/GSC), monitoring (Datadog/New Relic/OTEL), and voice (Bland AI/ElevenLabs/Whisper). Includes /gtm go-to-market planner, /ops:projects portfolio dashboard, and YOLO mode for autonomous operation with 4 parallel C-suite agents.

prevent_secret_commit.title: Block git commits containing secrets
prevent_secret_commit.description: PreToolUse hook scans `git diff --cached` for high-confidence secret patterns (Stripe, AWS, GitHub tokens, JWTs, hardcoded passwords) and denies the commit if a match is found.

no_rm_rf_anchor.title: Block rm -rf against root anchors
no_rm_rf_anchor.description: PreToolUse hook denies `rm -rf` targeting /, ~, $HOME, .., or . — protecting against catastrophic filesystem wipes. Specific subpaths (./node_modules, /tmp/foo) are allowed.

warn_mainpush.title: Confirm direct push to main/master/production
warn_mainpush.description: PreToolUse hook forces user confirmation when pushing directly to a protected branch (main/master/production), either via explicit destination or while currently on the branch.

deploy_fix_enabled.title: Deploy auto-fix enabled
deploy_fix_enabled.description: Master switch for the post-merge + build-failure auto-fix subsystem. Spacebar toggles.

monitor_post_merge.title: Monitor PR merges → deploys
monitor_post_merge.description: After `gh pr merge` to dev/main, watch the deploy workflow + audit service health.

monitor_build_failures.title: Monitor `npm run build:*` failures
monitor_build_failures.description: After a local build script fails, dispatch a Haiku build-fixer.

auto_dispatch_fixer.title: Auto-dispatch headless Claude fixer
auto_dispatch_fixer.description: When off, failures are logged + notified only — no agent runs.

allow_dangerous.title: Fixer skips permission prompts
allow_dangerous.description: Pass --dangerously-skip-permissions to the headless fixer (required for unattended autonomy).

auto_rerun_transients.title: Auto-rerun on transient failures
auto_rerun_transients.description: Detect npm/gh-actions/network blips and `gh run rerun` instead of dispatching an agent.

audit_health_after_deploy.title: Audit /health after deploy
audit_health_after_deploy.description: curl service health URL once deploy succeeds. Failure dispatches a fixer.

verify_served_commit.title: Verify served commit matches merge
verify_served_commit.description: Hit /version and check served SHA equals merged SHA.

fix_model.title: Fix-agent model
fix_model.description: Anthropic model the fixer runs on. Default haiku (fast/cheap). Use sonnet/opus for harder failures.

max_fixes_per_hour.title: Per-repo fix budget per hour
max_fixes_per_hour.description: Cap on auto-fix dispatches per repo per hour.

watcher_timeout_seconds.title: Deploy watcher timeout (seconds)
watcher_timeout_seconds.description: Max wait for deploy workflow completion.

registry_path.title: Service registry JSON
registry_path.description: Maps owner/repo:base → health/version URLs. Project .claude/post-merge-services.json overrides.

repo_search_roots.title: Repo search roots
repo_search_roots.description: Colon-separated dirs to find a repo on disk. Example: ~/Projects:~/work

deploy_workflow_pattern.title: Deploy workflow regex
deploy_workflow_pattern.description: Identifies which GitHub Actions run is the deploy.

notify_channel.title: Failure notification channel
notify_channel.description: Where to push failure alerts: macos, ntfy, pushover, discord, telegram, or none.

recap_marquee_enabled.title: Recap marquee (tmux digest)
recap_marquee_enabled.description: Run the daemon that synthesizes a one-line digest across all parallel Claude sessions, displayed in tmux status-right.

recap_marquee_auto_configure_tmux.title: Auto-configure tmux status-right
recap_marquee_auto_configure_tmux.description: Append the marquee source to ~/.tmux.conf during /ops:setup.

account_rotation_enabled.title: Multi-account Claude rotator
account_rotation_enabled.description: Run the launchd daemon that rotates between Claude Max accounts as quotas approach the cap.

account_rotation_setup_oauth_each.title: Setup OAuth for each account
account_rotation_setup_oauth_each.description: During /ops:setup, walk through OAuth init for every configured Claude account that doesn't have a keychain token yet.

task_reminder_enabled.title: Periodic Task* tool reminder
task_reminder_enabled.description: PostToolUse hook nudging Claude to use TaskCreate/TaskUpdate every N tool calls without one.

task_reminder_threshold.title: Task reminder threshold
task_reminder_threshold.description: Number of non-Task tool calls before the reminder fires.

suggest_specialized_agents.title: Suggest specialized subagents
suggest_specialized_agents.description: PreToolUse hook on Agent — when subagent_type=general-purpose, asks if a domain-specific agent fits better.

telegram_api_id.title: Telegram API ID
telegram_api_id.description: Numeric API ID from https://my.telegram.org/apps. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure.

telegram_api_hash.title: Telegram API Hash
telegram_api_hash.description: API hash from https://my.telegram.org/apps. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

telegram_phone.title: Telegram Phone Number
telegram_phone.description: Your phone number in E.164 format. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure.

telegram_session.title: Telegram Session String
telegram_session.description: gram.js StringSession. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

aws_region.title: AWS Region
aws_region.description: Default AWS region for infra checks. Valid: us-east-1, us-east-2, us-west-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1, eu-central-1, ap-southeast-1, ap-northeast-1.

klaviyo_private_key.title: Klaviyo Private API Key
klaviyo_private_key.description: Private API key from Klaviyo Settings > API Keys (starts with pk_ or ck_) If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

meta_ads_token.title: Meta Ads Access Token
meta_ads_token.description: Meta Marketing API access token from Facebook Business If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

ga4_property_id.title: Google Analytics 4 Property ID
ga4_property_id.description: Numeric GA4 property ID. Find in GA4 Admin > Property Settings.

google_search_console_site.title: Google Search Console Site URL
google_search_console_site.description: Site URL as registered in Search Console (e.g., https://example.com)

shopify_admin_token.title: Shopify Admin API Token
shopify_admin_token.description: Admin API access token from Shopify Partners or custom app If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

shipbob_access_token.title: ShipBob Access Token
shipbob_access_token.description: ShipBob Personal Access Token for fulfillment tracking (optional) If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

bland_ai_api_key.title: Bland AI API Key
bland_ai_api_key.description: API key from https://app.bland.ai — used for /ops:ops-voice call If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

elevenlabs_api_key.title: ElevenLabs API Key
elevenlabs_api_key.description: API key from https://elevenlabs.io — used for /ops:ops-voice tts If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

groq_api_key.title: Groq API Key
groq_api_key.description: API key from https://console.groq.com — used for /ops:ops-voice transcribe (Whisper) If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

stripe_secret_key.title: Stripe Secret Key
stripe_secret_key.description: Stripe secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...) for revenue tracking. Prefer Doppler reference. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

revenuecat_api_key.title: RevenueCat API Key
revenuecat_api_key.description: RevenueCat API key for mobile subscription revenue tracking (V2 API). If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

datadog_api_key.title: Datadog API Key
datadog_api_key.description: From Datadog Organization Settings > API Keys — used for /ops:monitor If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

datadog_app_key.title: Datadog Application Key
datadog_app_key.description: From Datadog Organization Settings > Application Keys If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

newrelic_api_key.title: New Relic API Key
newrelic_api_key.description: User API Key from one.newrelic.com/api-keys — used for /ops:monitor If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

newrelic_account_id.title: New Relic Account ID
newrelic_account_id.description: Numeric account ID from one.newrelic.com admin portal.

otel_endpoint.title: OTEL Backend Endpoint
otel_endpoint.description: Base URL of your OpenTelemetry-compatible backend (e.g., https://otlp.grafana.net)

telegram_notify_chat_id.title: Telegram Notification Chat ID
telegram_notify_chat_id.description: Chat ID to receive fire alerts. Defaults to telegram_phone's DM if unset.

ntfy_topic.title: ntfy.sh Topic
ntfy_topic.description: Topic name (e.g., claude-ops-fires-<random>) for ntfy.sh pushes. Free, no account required.

pushover_user_key.title: Pushover User Key
pushover_user_key.description: From https://pushover.net/ — paired with pushover_app_token. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

pushover_app_token.title: Pushover App Token
pushover_app_token.description: App-specific token from https://pushover.net/apps/build If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

discord_bot_token.title: Discord Bot Token
discord_bot_token.description: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal — used for channel reads and DMs. Prefer Doppler reference. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

discord_guild_id.title: Discord Guild ID
discord_guild_id.description: Server/guild ID (right-click server in Discord → Copy ID with Developer Mode enabled)

discord_default_webhook_url.title: Discord Default Webhook URL
discord_default_webhook_url.description: Optional default webhook URL (https://discord.com/api/webhooks/…) for /ops:comms discord send. Shared with the ops-fires notification sink (which also reads discord_webhook_url). If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

doppler_token.title: Doppler Token
doppler_token.description: Doppler service or personal token for the @dopplerhq/mcp-server MCP integration. Generated by /ops:setup or paste manually. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

doppler_project.title: Doppler Default Project
doppler_project.description: Default Doppler project slug (e.g. 'my-app'). Used by the Doppler MCP server.

doppler_config.title: Doppler Default Config
doppler_config.description: Default Doppler config name (e.g. 'dev', 'stg', 'prd'). Used by the Doppler MCP server.

myparcel_api_key.title: MyParcel.nl API Key
myparcel_api_key.description: Plain API key from backoffice.myparcel.nl → Settings → API. Used by /ops:ops-package. Script base64-encodes it at runtime — do NOT pre-encode.

sendcloud_public_key.title: Sendcloud Public Key
sendcloud_public_key.description: Public key from Sendcloud Panel → Settings → Integrations → Sendcloud API. Paired with sendcloud_private_key.

sendcloud_private_key.title: Sendcloud Private Key
sendcloud_private_key.description: Private key from Sendcloud Panel → Settings → Integrations → Sendcloud API. Paired with sendcloud_public_key.

dhl_parcel_user_id.title: DHL Parcel NL User ID
dhl_parcel_user_id.description: User ID issued in My DHL Parcel → User settings → API settings. Paired with dhl_parcel_key.

dhl_parcel_key.title: DHL Parcel NL API Key
dhl_parcel_key.description: API key from My DHL Parcel → User settings → API settings. Paired with dhl_parcel_user_id.

postnl_api_key.title: PostNL API Key
postnl_api_key.description: apikey from developer.postnl.nl. Required together with postnl_customer_code and postnl_customer_number.

postnl_customer_code.title: PostNL Customer Code
postnl_customer_code.description: Three-letter customer code from your PostNL contract (e.g. DEVC).

postnl_customer_number.title: PostNL Customer Number
postnl_customer_number.description: Eight-digit customer number from your PostNL contract.

dpd_delis_id.title: DPD DelisID
dpd_delis_id.description: DelisID from MyDPD / DPD eSolutions. Paired with dpd_password.

dpd_password.title: DPD Password
dpd_password.description: Password for the DelisID. Exchanged at login for a short-lived token. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

ups_client_id.title: UPS OAuth Client ID
ups_client_id.description: Client ID from developer.ups.com apps. Paired with ups_client_secret and ups_shipper_number.

ups_client_secret.title: UPS OAuth Client Secret
ups_client_secret.description: Client secret for the UPS app. Used for OAuth2 client_credentials. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

ups_shipper_number.title: UPS Shipper Number
ups_shipper_number.description: Six-character UPS shipper/account number used for billing shipments.

fedex_client_id.title: FedEx OAuth Client ID
fedex_client_id.description: API Key from developer.fedex.com projects. Paired with fedex_client_secret and fedex_account_number.

fedex_client_secret.title: FedEx OAuth Client Secret
fedex_client_secret.description: Secret Key for the FedEx project. Used for OAuth2 client_credentials. If already configured via /ops:setup or stored in keychain/Doppler, leave blank — runtime resolves automatically.

fedex_account_number.title: FedEx Account Number
fedex_account_number.description: Nine-digit FedEx shipping account number used as the billing party.

telegram_enabled.title: Enable Telegram integration
telegram_enabled.description: Use Telegram for inbox + notifications. Requires telegram_api_id/hash/phone/session — run /ops:setup telegram.

discord_enabled.title: Enable Discord integration
discord_enabled.description: Use Discord for outbound webhooks + bot reads. Requires discord_bot_token or discord_default_webhook_url.

pushover_enabled.title: Enable Pushover notifications
pushover_enabled.description: Use Pushover for failure alerts. Requires pushover_user_key + pushover_app_token.

ntfy_enabled.title: Enable ntfy.sh notifications
ntfy_enabled.description: Use ntfy.sh for free phone-push alerts. Requires ntfy_topic.

sentry_enabled.title: Enable Sentry integration
sentry_enabled.description: Use Sentry MCP for error/issue triage. Requires sentry_org.

linear_enabled.title: Enable Linear integration
linear_enabled.description: Use Linear MCP for issue/sprint workflows. Requires linear_team.

datadog_enabled.title: Enable Datadog integration
datadog_enabled.description: Use Datadog for APM + monitor pulls. Requires datadog_api_key + datadog_app_key.

newrelic_enabled.title: Enable New Relic integration
newrelic_enabled.description: Use New Relic for APM + alerts. Requires newrelic_api_key + newrelic_account_id.

otel_enabled.title: Enable OpenTelemetry endpoint
otel_enabled.description: Send ops traces/metrics to OTEL collector. Requires otel_endpoint.

doppler_enabled.title: Enable Doppler integration
doppler_enabled.description: Use Doppler for secret resolution + MCP server. Requires doppler_token + doppler_project.

klaviyo_enabled.title: Enable Klaviyo integration
klaviyo_enabled.description: Pull email/SMS marketing data. Requires klaviyo_private_key.

meta_ads_enabled.title: Enable Meta Ads integration
meta_ads_enabled.description: Pull Facebook/Instagram ad spend + ROAS. Requires meta_ads_token + meta_ad_account_id.

ga4_enabled.title: Enable Google Analytics 4
ga4_enabled.description: Pull GA4 traffic + conversion data. Requires ga4_property_id and gcloud ADC.

gsc_enabled.title: Enable Google Search Console
gsc_enabled.description: Pull SEO + organic search data. Requires google_search_console_site and gcloud ADC.

shopify_enabled.title: Enable Shopify integration
shopify_enabled.description: Use Shopify Admin API for orders/inventory. Requires shopify_store_url + shopify_admin_token.

shipbob_enabled.title: Enable ShipBob integration
shipbob_enabled.description: Pull fulfillment + inventory data from ShipBob. Requires shipbob_access_token.

bland_ai_enabled.title: Enable Bland AI integration
bland_ai_enabled.description: Outbound AI phone calls via Bland AI. Requires bland_ai_api_key.

elevenlabs_enabled.title: Enable ElevenLabs integration
elevenlabs_enabled.description: Text-to-speech + voice cloning via ElevenLabs. Requires elevenlabs_api_key.

groq_enabled.title: Enable Groq integration
groq_enabled.description: Fast inference (Whisper, LLaMA) via Groq. Requires groq_api_key.

stripe_enabled.title: Enable Stripe revenue tracking
stripe_enabled.description: Query Stripe for MRR/charges/disputes. Requires stripe_secret_key.

revenuecat_enabled.title: Enable RevenueCat integration
revenuecat_enabled.description: Query RevenueCat for mobile sub MRR. Requires revenuecat_api_key + revenuecat_project_id.

postnl_enabled.title: Enable PostNL shipping
postnl_enabled.description: Use PostNL labels via /ops:package. Requires postnl_customer_code + customer_number.

dpd_enabled.title: Enable DPD shipping
dpd_enabled.description: Use DPD labels via /ops:package. Requires dpd_delis_id + dpd_password.

ups_enabled.title: Enable UPS shipping
ups_enabled.description: Use UPS labels via /ops:package. Requires ups_client_id/secret + shipper_number.

fedex_enabled.title: Enable FedEx shipping
fedex_enabled.description: Use FedEx labels via /ops:package. Requires fedex_client_id/secret + account_number.
